title: Creamy Clarified Malaysian Resin Curry
description: A rich and creamy curry featuring orange blossom water, clarified butter, and a touch of resinous flavor, perfect for post-workout
instructions: Heat the clarified butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the bruised lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, and dried chili pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the fish sauce and orange blossom water.
Using a spherification agent (e.g. sodium alginate, calcium chloride), create small spheres of the curry and add to the pan.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh herbs and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
Note: Spherification may require additional setup and equipment.
